name: Norowas
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — reprising the noble white Mage Knight. An inspiring leader who fights through his allies, marshalling the host with light and loyalty.

orderAction.name: Command
orderAction.summary: Play 1 Command token on one of your Units currently in play.

figureCandidates.name: Wolfhawk
figureCandidates.roleFit: An alternate Mage Knight hero, if you prefer a mobile commander.
